mapper.sql: SELECT manufacturer_id, manufacturer_name, contact_person, contact_phone, address, business_license, status, del_flag, tenant_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time FROM iot_manufacturer
mapper.select: WHERE manufacturer_name = #{manufacturerName} AND del_flag = '0' AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: UPDATE iot_manufacturer SET del_flag = '2' WHERE manufacturer_id = #{manufacturerId} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM iot_device WHERE manufacturer_id = #{manufacturerId} AND del_flag = '0'
